productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Printed Blue Tshirts
description: CompositionBlue T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a round neck, short sleeves and graphic print on the frontFittingSlimWash careDelicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergentDo not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleachDry flat in shadeWarm iron do not iron directly on print/embroideryThis brilliantly designed T-shirt from united colors of benetton in understated blue flaunts the colourful 60's Jamaican reggae lifestyle in its print.
